project_identity.name: GTM Intelligence Platform
project_identity.core_philosophy: Data density, precision, and functional beauty. No gradients, no fluff. Content is King.

layout.spacing_system: Use loose spacing for containers (p-6, p-8) but tight spacing for data tables (py-2, gap-2).
layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid (Mode A) for Dashboards, Dense Grid (Mode B) for Analytics.

container_styles.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-zinc-800 h-screen bg-[#09090b] fixed left-0 top-0 z-50

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 h-9 px-4 rounded-md font-medium text-sm transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 hover:bg-zinc-900 h-9 px-4 rounded-md font-medium text-sm transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-900 h-9 px-4 rounded-md font-medium text-sm transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-red-900/20 text-red-500 hover:bg-red-900/30 border border-red-900/50 h-9 px-4 rounded-md font-medium text-sm transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-transparent border border-zinc-800 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:border-zinc-500 focus:ring-0 rounded-md h-9 px-3 text-sm font-sans

tables.header: bg-zinc-900/50 border-b border-zinc-800 text-xs font-medium uppercase text-zinc-500 h-10 px-4 text-left

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-sm px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ring-1 ring-inset

visual_enhancers.noise_overlay: opacity-[0.03] pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-[9999] mix-blend-overlay bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]

libraries.charts: Recharts (customized to look flat and minimal)

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME ENFORCEMENT: Force dark mode by adding 'dark' class to html/body tag in index.html and ensuring all Tailwind classes assume dark mode (e.g., bg-background is black).
2. FONT SETUP: Import Inter and JetBrains Mono in index.css. Apply 'font-sans' to body and 'font-mono' to all data tables and metrics.
3. COMPONENT STYLE: Override default Shadcn rounded-lg with rounded-md or rounded-sm for a sharper 'Linear' look.
4. LAYOUT: Implement the Sidebar Layout as the primary wrapper for all authenticated pages.
5. DATA DENSITY: Use compact padding for tables. Do not use 'comfortable' spacing for data-heavy views.
6. TIER COLORS: Strict adherence to Green (A), Yellow (B), Red (C) for badges and indicators.
7. TEST IDS: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements (z-index) but keep it subtle.
Avoid gradients for backgrounds; use them only for tiny accents or 'glow' effects.
Use 1px borders with low opacity (white/10) to define areas instead of shadows.
Micro-interactions: Buttons should have a distinct hover and active state.
Never use 'System Fonts' if possible; load Inter to ensure consistency.
For empty states, use the 'empty_state_abstract' image with a grayscale filter.
